subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The effect of thy jewel-scattering pen hath brought about spiritual joy and sweet fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و میثاق اثر کلک گهربار سبب حصول روح و ریحان گردید چه که ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the power of words; of speech
